name: Ultimate Obedient Fiend
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>絶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>対</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>服</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>従</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card can only attack if this card is the only card on your side of the field and if you also have no cards in your hand. The effects of Effect Monsters that this card destroys are negated.
mnst_eff: This card can only attack if this card is the only card on your side of the field and if you also have no cards in your hand. The effects of Effect Monsters that this card destroys are negated.
eff: This card can only attack if this card is the only card on your side of the field and if you also have no cards in your hand. The effects of Effect Monsters that this card destroys are negated.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
misc: Requires control of no other monsters
Requires control of no Spell and Traps
Requires having no cards in hand
